title: Annual Leave Entitlement and Booking Vacation
text:
Q: What is my annual leave entitlement and how do I book vacation?
A: Employees are entitled to 20 days of paid annual leave per year, in addition to public holidays. Annual leave is accrued at a rate of 1.67 days per month, starting from your first month of employment. To book vacation, please submit a leave request through the HR portal at least four weeks in advance to ensure adequate coverage. Your manager will review the request and confirm approval within five business days. If you need to cancel or modify your leave, please notify your manager as soon as possible. For any questions or issues regarding your leave balance or booking process, contact the HR department at hr@company.com.
